evals.expected_output: Loads the existing artifacts, detects resume state (done/open/blocked), and continues without re-planning.
assertions: Reads at least 01/04/05/09 from the named plan.
Summarizes resume state (already done / open / blocked) and asks resume/restart/stop.
Does not regenerate or edit 01-08 to change scope.
Extracts build/test commands from 07 or CLAUDE.md rather than inventing them.

evals.prompt: /m_plan_implement Finish and deploy the staging webhook plan.
evals.expected_output: Walks the step plan, then enforces a real-target deploy: refuses to mark V-DEPLOY/V-SMOKE done from localhost, observes the real running artifact, and blocks if no real deploy path exists.
assertions: Treats local build/unit/dev-server checks as preflight only (deploy reality invariant).
Requires observation of the real running artifact (remote probe, container status, service logs, etc.).
If no real deploy path is identifiable for a deployable runtime, stops with V-DEPLOY-* blocked instead of reporting DONE.
Applies the destructive-action policy before restarts/migrations on shared or prod targets.

evals.prompt: /m_plan_implement Execute the plan and give me the report.
evals.expected_output: After execution, re-reads 09 and emits the Done / Worked-around-or-changed / Not-done report with status and the next smallest step.
assertions: Emits all three report sections even when one is empty.
Pulls 'worked around or changed' from 09's ## Deviations verbatim.
Final status is one of DONE / PARTIAL / BLOCKED and matches the V-* states.
Names the smallest next action for each open or blocked item.
